auto_kitchen.title: Automate at least one food recipe using Create contraptions (e.g. auto-smoking, auto-pressing)

subtitle.text: The machine does not care about the taste. That is not its job.

description: Food automation is the engineer's approach to hunger.
The machine doesn't rest. The machine doesn't miss.
The machine runs the Farmer's Delight cutting board
at the same rate, every second, indefinitely.
A Mechanical Arm can move items between inventories.
A Deployer can right-click blocks — including cutting boards.
A Basin + Mechanical Mixer automates brewing recipes.
The second kitchen line is faster than the first.
→ Craft a Mechanical Arm (for item routing)
→ Automate at least one food recipe using Create [check]
